chunks.title: Lament in Exile and Vow to Remember Zion
chunks.reason: This section forms a cohesive unit describing the captors' demand for songs of Zion and the psalmist's vow to remember Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Edom and Babylon
chunks.reason: This section shifts to a prophetic judgment against Edom for their role in Jerusalem's fall and a blessing of vengeance against Babylon.
